zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Pieter de Brier於1575年12月1日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 福藍肯塔爾福藍肯塔爾時，他的父親Adriaen De Brier30歲，母親Geertruydt Paris Fayk22歲。他於1600年之前與Sara Colle在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 福藍肯塔爾福藍肯塔爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1645年1月1日在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Pieter de Brier于1575年12月1日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 福藍肯塔爾福藍肯塔爾时，他的父亲Adriaen De Brier30岁，母亲Geertruydt Paris Fayk22岁。他于1600年之前与Sara Colle在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 福藍肯塔爾福藍肯塔爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1645年1月1日在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): topographic name for someone who lived by a briar patch, Middle English brere (Old English brǣr ‘thorn bush’). This was also applied as a nickname for a prickly, difficult person. Compare Breer .

variants.name: Bryer
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Breuer  .

variants.name: Breer
meanings: German: shortened form of   Breger   or   Breder  .

English: variant of Brier or Brear, from Old English brǣr ‘thorn bush’, hence a nickname for a sharp or prickly person or a topographic name for someone who lived by such plants. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Briers
meanings: English: variant of Brier , with excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Pieter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Pieter de Brier was born on 1 December 1575, in Frankenthal, Frankenthal, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Adriaen De Brier, was 30 and his mother, Geertruydt Paris Fayk, was 22. He married Sara Colle before 1600, in Frankenthal, Frankenthal, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 1 January 1645, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Pieter de Brier est né le 1 décembre 1575, à Frankenthal, Landkreis Frankenthal, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Adriaen De Brier, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Geertruydt Paris Fayk, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sara Colle avant 1600, à Frankenthal, Landkreis Frankenthal, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1645, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Pieter de Brier(이)가 1575년 12월 1일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 프랭켄솔 프랭켄솔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adriaen De Brier(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Geertruydt Paris Fayk(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1600년 이전 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 프랭켄솔 프랭켄솔에서 Sara Colle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1645년 1월 1일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Pieter de Brier родился 1 декабря 1575 г. в местности фрэнкэнтэл, ландкрис фрэнкэнтэл, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Adriaen De Brier было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Geertruydt Paris Fayk, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara Colle перед 1600 г. в местности фрэнкэнтэл, ландкрис фрэнкэнтэл, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1645 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.
